data.title: OKX will launch HYPEUSDT perpetual contract
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX will officially launch HYPEUSDT perpetual contracts on the web, App and API at 3:00 pm (UTC+8) on February 21, 2025, and settle HYPEUSDT pre-market delivery contracts at 6:00 pm (UTC+8) on the same day. The leverage multiple of HYPEUSDT perpetual contracts is 0.01~20x, the funding frequency is 4 hours, and the trading time is 7×24 hours. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Trump To Sign Executive Order This Wednesday
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump is set to sign an executive order this Wednesday at 19:30 Eastern Time. This development comes amid various market speculations. Further details regarding the content of the executive order have not been disclosed.

data.title: Semler Scientific Q4 net income rises to nearly $300 million as it adopts new accounting rules to account for Bitcoin holdings
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Semler Scientific (SMLR), a US-listed company, adopted a new "fair value" accounting rule to measure the company's digital asset holdings in the fourth quarter of 2024, increasing the value of its Bitcoin reserves by $28.85 million, resulting in total net income of $29.206 billion or $3.64 per share for the quarter, compared to $4.2 million or $0.62 in the same period last year.
The FASB fair value rule was introduced in March 2024, requiring companies to report digital assets at market value as of the first quarter of 2025. However, companies can adopt the rule before then at their own discretion.
As of today, Semler continues to hold 3,192 BTC, worth more than $300 million. The company's total purchase price is $280.4 million. (CoinDesk)

data.title: $CATI enters deflation era: 9 million coins consumed in Q4 2024, expected to exceed 100 million coins in 2025
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Catizen's 2024 annual report reported by CoinDesk during Consensus, the CATIZEN platform's annual revenue in 2024 reached US$34.15 million, the number of users exceeded 55 million, and the number of active users on the chain reached 3.3 million, of which 1.2 million were paying users.
In the fourth quarter of 2024, Catizen upgraded from a single game platform to Mini App Center, and launched 21 mini games in just three months, driving the platform's revenue to US$19.77 million. Among them, BOMBIE games contributed 48% of the revenue. It is expected that by 2025, the revenue of Mini App Center will exceed US$80 million to US$100 million.
In terms of token consumption, in the fourth quarter of 2024, the consumption of $CATI tokens in Mini App Center has exceeded 9 million, and it is expected that by 2025, the annual consumption of $CATI will exceed 100 million.

data.title: Coinbase exchange launches CFTC-regulated futures for Solana and Hedera
data.description:
Coinbase exchange has unveiled CFTC-regulated futures for Hedera and Solana. The launched offerings have introduced more crypto products to institutions in the U.S. market.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinbase-exchange-launches-cftc-futures/

data.title: Abraxas Capital Mgmt associated addresses deposited 24,810 ETH to the exchange in the past 24 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, Abraxas Capital Mgmt associated address 0xEd0...a4312 has deposited 24,810 ETH to the exchange in the past 24 hours, with a total value of US$66.04 million and an average deposit price of US$2,661.
The address currently holds a total of 110,224 ETH in protocols such as Lido/ether.fi/Aave/Compound, with a total value of up to US$295 million.

data.title: Binance Wins Best Crypto Application at 2024 Sensor Tower APAC Awards
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On February 18, Binance announced that it won the title of "Best Crypto App" in the 2024 Sensor Tower APAC Awards. Binance has become the top application in this category for its leading performance in the field of cryptocurrency.
Every year, the Sensor Tower APAC Awards selects leaders in various types of applications and games based on insights from Sensor Tower Intelligence. These rankings are based on multiple key indicators, including downloads, in-app purchase revenue (IAP), number of active users, comments, ratings, and overall impact on society and industry.
Andy Goldin, Head of Data and Analytics at Binance, said: “We are honored to receive the ‘Best Crypto App’ award at the 2024 Sensor Tower APAC Awards. This recognition is a testament to our team’s commitment to providing the best experience for our users and is consistent with recent data results that showcase Binance’s strong performance.
According to DefiLlama, Binance custody $150 billion in crypto assets for users, and CCData reports that we have facilitated more than $100 trillion in trading volume since 2017. We will continue to be committed to innovation and excellence to advance the cryptocurrency space, and look forward to continued growth and progress in the future.”

data.title: Hong Kong To Release Virtual Asset Roadmap
data.description: According to Foresight News, during the Consensus Hong Kong 2025 conference, the Chief Executive Officer of the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC), Leung Fung-yee, announced that Hong Kong will release its virtual asset roadmap this afternoon. The SFC is focusing on custody, over-the-counter (OTC) trading, and stablecoin transactions. Leung highlighted significant progress in crypto custody, trading, and issuance, aiming to encourage more institutional participation in the sector. She emphasized that blockchain technology can enhance settlement efficiency and noted that Hong Kong has distinct regulatory measures for the crypto industry. These measures require a flexible approach to integrate and promote responsible innovation while providing a robust regulatory framework.

data.title: Hong Kong SFC CEO Discusses Crypto Regulation Progress at Consensus Hong Kong 2025
data.description:
According to Odaily, Julia Leung, CEO of the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC), highlighted the rapid progress of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) in the field of cryptocurrency regulation during the Consensus Hong Kong 2025 event. She noted that Hong Kong is actively considering its position in the evolving crypto landscape, acknowledging that regulatory frameworks from other regions may not be suitable for Hong Kong.

Since 2023, Hong Kong has implemented a licensing system to oversee the development of trading platforms within the region. This system also extends to financial service roles such as banks and brokers. The regulation encompasses crypto asset custody, over-the-counter (OTC) trading, and the issuance of crypto financial products.

This afternoon, the SFC is set to release a regulatory roadmap focused on investor protection. The roadmap aims to cover various participants within the ecosystem and maintain consistency, thereby clarifying compliance requirements for businesses.
